videos.title: IELTS English Podcast - Speaking Topic: Technology
videos.description: Welcome to the thirty-sixth episode of the IELTS Plus English podcast, where you can learn vocabulary and phrases to talk about technology! Every week, listen to me answer REAL part 1, part 2, and part 3 questions from the IELTS exam, while trying to include 10 key words and phrases for each topic.

videos.title: Nail Your Opinion Essay in 17 Minutes: IELTS Writing Task 2 (Agree or Disagree)
videos.description:
👉 Download the full sample answer: https://bit.ly/pdf-space
Find out how to write a Band 9 answer to a common type of IELTS Writing Task 2, agree-disagree or opinion essay. 

🚀 FASTRACK IELTS COURSES
Prepare for your exam in less time and achieve a higher score.
- IELTS Academic Pack: https://bit.ly
